scripts.title: Post Message In Slack
scripts.description: Posts message in a slack public channel
scripts.code:
<?php

use GuzzleHttp\Client;
use GuzzleHttp\RequestOptions;

// Rest client
$client = new Client([
    'base_uri' => getenv('HOST_URL'),
    'verify' => false,
    'defaults' => [
        'verify' => false,
        'headers' => ['Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN'), 'content-type' => 'application/json'],
    ],
]);

// Call to post message
$response = $client->post('api/1.0/connector-slack/send', [
    RequestOptions::JSON => [
        'channel' => $config['channel']['id'],
        'text' => base64_encode($config['textBody']),
        'json_data' => $data,
    ],
]);

if ($response->getStatusCode() != 200) {
    throw new SlackApiException($response->getBody(), $response);
}

return [];

scripts.title: SG - Register Answers
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */
$uuid  = $data["uuid"];
$email = $data["email"];
$answersCollectionId = $data['answersCollectionId'];
$whiteListCollectionId = $data['whiteListCollectionId'];

/*/
$uuid = "810ee323-873b-089d-3fef-789c81bbf7c4";
$email = "edwin.choque@processmaker.com";
/*/
$pattern = "/\question\d+/";

foreach($data as $key => $row) {
    if(preg_match($pattern, $key)) {
        $questions[$key] = $data[$key];
    }
}

/*Init Guzzle (use endpoint) and set options */
$guzzleClient = new \GuzzleHttp\Client(['base_uri'=> $_SERVER['APP_URL'],'verify' => false]);
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Accept'] = 'application/json';
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');

//$collectionId = $config['answersCollectionId'] ?? 10;

$record = [
    "uuid"  => $uuid
];

$record = array_merge($record, $questions);

$result = postCollection($answersCollectionId, $record);

$output["collectionRecordId"] = $result["id"];
$output["collectionId"] = $answersCollectionId;

/*/
Update survey participated.
/*/
//$collectionId = 11; // Survey invitees
//$collectionId = $config['whiteListCollectionId'] ?? 11;

$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/' . $whiteListCollectionId . '/records?pmql=data.uuid="' . $uuid . '" and data.email="' . $email . '"';

try {
    $res = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
    $record = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"][0]["data"];
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'error' => [
            'code'    => $th->getCode(),
            'message' => $th->getMessage()
        ]
    ];
}

$collectionRecordId = $record["id"];
$record["hasParticipated"] = true;

$result = putCollection($whiteListCollectionId, $record);

return $output;

function putCollection($collectionId, $params = "") {
    global $collectionRecordId, $guzzleClient, $guzzleOptions;

    $guzzleHttpMethod = "PUT";
    $guzzleApi = "/api/1.0/collections/" . $collectionId . "/records/" . $collectionRecordId;
    $guzzleOptions['json'] = $params;

    try {
        $guzzleResponse = $guzzleClient->request($guzzleHttpMethod, $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        $response = json_decode($guzzleResponse->getBody(), true);
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        $response = [
            'error' => [
                'code' => $th->getCode(),
                'message' => $th->getMessage()
            ]
        ];
    }

    return $response;
}

function postCollection($collectionId, $params = "") {

    if(empty($collectionId)) { return null; }

    global $guzzleClient, $guzzleOptions;

    $guzzleHttpMethod = "POST";
    $guzzleApi = "/api/1.0/collections/" . $collectionId . "/records";
    $guzzleOptions['json'] = $params;

    try {
        $guzzleResponse = $guzzleClient->request($guzzleHttpMethod, $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        $response = json_decode($guzzleResponse->getBody(), true);
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        $response = [
            'error' => [
                'code'    => $th->getCode(),
                'message' => $th->getMessage()
            ]
        ];
    }

    return $response;
}
